title: witness-rivet-evidence/v1
description: Rivet-shape coverage evidence file. Witness emits this when a requirement-mapping YAML is supplied; rivet's CoverageStore consumer ingests the file directly. On-disk format is YAML in production; this schema also describes its JSON projection (the same field names and shapes apply). Derived from witness-core/src/rivet_evidence.rs (EvidenceFile).

schema.description: Schema URL identifying this document. Always `https://pulseengine.eu/witness-rivet-evidence/v1`.

version.description: Sub-version inside the v1 namespace; bumped on breaking content changes (e.g. additional required fields).

witness_version.description: Version of the witness toolchain that produced this file (Cargo package version).

evidence.description: Per-artefact coverage evidence, one entry per requirement / artefact id grouped from the input map.

id.description: Stable identifier for this run; default form is `witness-<timestamp>`.

timestamp.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of when the evidence file was written. Honours SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH for reproducibility.

source.description: Free-text label naming the run source (e.g. "cargo test", "witness run", "ci").

path.description: Path of the instrumented Wasm module the evidence was measured against.

digest.description: Optional SHA-256 digest of the module bytes.

CoverageEvidence.description: One artefact's coverage evidence: total branches mapped, how many were covered, hit counts, and the list of uncovered branch ids.

artifact.description: Rivet artefact id (e.g. `REQ-001`) this evidence row corresponds to.

total.description: Total number of branches mapped to this artefact.

covered.description: Number of branches with hit count > 0.

percentage.description: Coverage ratio as a floating-point percentage (0.0..=100.0). 100.0 when total = 0 (vacuous coverage).

hits.description: Per-branch hit counts in the same order as the requirement-map mapping.

uncovered_branch_ids.description: Sorted-ascending list of branch ids that were never hit.

CoverageType.description:
Coverage projection this evidence row represents.
- `branch` — per-`br_if` / per-arm / per-`br_table`-target branch coverage (what witness emits today).
- `mcdc` — MC/DC condition decomposition (reserved; not yet emitted into rivet evidence).
- `line` — source-line coverage (reserved; out of scope for witness today).
